view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided indicates that the system successfully created a gate marking a time window as unavailable based on the queue's ETA signal. Specifically, the scenario describes how the system updates the availability window when the ETA shifts, which directly aligns with the requirement. The action request for blocking the calendar also confirms that the system is capable of handling temporary unavailability based on queue signals.
